plan_adherence_notes: Against `ff/Tbayes-market-ed8-execute-step-1`, this branch changes only `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-ed8-execute-step-1-execute-step-2/{questions,research,plan}.json`. `backend/server.py`, `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py`, and `tests/test_bayes_market_inference_module.py` are unchanged, so none of the planned shared `db`/`inference`/`auth` builders, live-state reads, or helper-level tests were implemented. `backend/server.py` still exposes `uptime_seconds()` plus a minimal `health_payload()` that returns only `service`, `status`, and `timestamp`.
reason: Reject: the research and plan follow from the codebase evidence, but this branch contains no execution diff beyond task metadata, so the requested helper builders and tests were not delivered. Validation tests still pass on the unchanged codebase via `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_bayes_market_inference_module.py'` and `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_bayes_market_api.py'`.
